hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(env|env\..*)$|secrets\.yaml$|credentials'; then echo '🚫 BLOCKED: 민감한 파일 수정 차단됨 (.env / secrets / credentials)' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css)$'; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/flowstock-front" 2>/dev/null && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(py)$'; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && python3 -m black "$FILE" --quiet 2>/dev/null; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude Code에서 입력을 기다리고 있습니다" with title "FlowStock"' 2>/dev/null || true
